title: Sherry Mélange
description: A light and nutty dish featuring sweet sherry, perfect for a dessert or snack option.

ingredients.name: 1/4 cup granulated sugar
ingredients.notes: For non-sugar free version, adjust sweetness accordingly.

ingredients.name: 3 tablespoons cognac or another dark liquor of your choice
ingredients.notes: To enhance flavors without adding sugars.

instructions: Combine heavy cream, sugar, and sweetened condensed milk in a saucepan.
Stir over medium heat until the mixture starts to simmer gently.
Reduce heat to low, add liqueur (if using), and cook for an additional 5 minutes without stirring.
Remove from heat and let cool slightly before serving.
